description: Temperature schedule start=3.0 anneal 10 steps: gen_median_hours 1→6.84h AUROC 0.452→0.497 gen_frac 1.0→0.876 GPU fix included
num_beams=4 longest-beam selection: gen_median_hours 6.84→10.79h gen_frac 0.876→0.776 but AUROC -0.0003 AUPRC +0.001 — no headline metric improved ≥0.005
Hazard-driven terminal suppression: draw T~Exp(48/p_term) from outcome head suppress terminal until elapsed>=T; AUROC 0.497→0.530 AUPRC 0.105→0.133 gen_median_hours 6.84→287h gen_frac 0.876→0.005

Freeze outcome head risk scores at seed end for all generated windows; eliminates mid-trajectory covariate shift; AUROC +0.012 AUPRC +0.011 MAE -9.64h; gen metrics unchanged within noise; DEATH +0.037 HYPOGLY/HYPERGLY/KIDNEY +0.025-0.045 RELEASE -0.038 CARDIO still 0.203 (mismatch: 48h horizon vs late-developing events)

outcome_horizon 48→168h + tau reset all=96h in P3: CARDIO 0.203→0.476 but DEATH 0.777→0.524 RELEASE 0.695→0.506 — global tau=96h destroyed short-term signal; also Phase2 ran 25 extra epochs with new horizon, damaged backbone (gen_median_steps 94→4)

Per-outcome tau init (DEATH/RELEASE=24h CARDIO=120h others=48h) + 168h horizon: AUROC 0.502 unchanged vs G — api.py clears+retrains Phase2 from scratch on every run; Phase2 with 168h horizon broke backbone (gen_median_steps=4) BEFORE Phase3 even started

Separate phase3_outcome_horizon_hours=168h from outcome_horizon_hours=48h: Phase2 still early-stops at epoch 23 (vl_loss plateaus); backbone still broken (gen_median_steps=4); AUROC unchanged ~0.50. Fix: force Phase2 to train full 100 epochs via phase2_early_stop_patience=80

phase2_early_stop_patience=80 → 98 Phase2 epochs; gen_median_steps still 4; backbone consistently finds degenerate local min (TERMINAL dominant at all positions) regardless of training duration; root cause: no fixed seed at GPT init (api.py:364)

seed=42 confirmed via smoke test (gen_median_steps=22) but full data (40k patients) overrides init → same TERMINAL-dominant local min; gen_median_steps=4 regardless; seed optimization dead end per user; need algorithmic fix

eval-only on K checkpoint; hazard_min=336h + max_step=3h → gen_median_steps 4→71 but AUROC unchanged (0.498 vs 0.499); broken backbone produces poor seed-end risk scores regardless of window coverage; need training-side fix

phase2_terminal_threshold_hours=24h zeroed TERMINAL BCE at >24h positions; gen_median_steps still 4; threshold too small for short-stay patients (<24h stay, common in ICU); AUROC regressed 0.499→0.494

direction E: tau_terminal 168h→12h (frozen via gradient hook); gen_median_steps still 4; narrowed BCE kernel alone insufficient; time-head magnitude still predicts large Δt at seed-end position regardless of TERMINAL handling

direction B: add cumulative-Δt MSE sequence-level loss alongside per-position dt MSE; AUROC 0.499→0.506 (+0.007) MAE -6.24h gen_median_hours 208→223h; first training-side fix showing positive trend; phase2_best_val=5196 dominated by traj_loss term — next experiment should gate by lambdas[dt] for cleaner convergence

stack direction E (narrow tau_terminal 168h→12h + freeze) on O; AUROC +0.001 vs O (below noise floor); narrow tau didn't add value on top of traj-length loss; Δt magnitude head remains the bottleneck not BCE width

direction C: add time-to-terminal regression head (predicts log1p(t_terminal - t_now)); AUROC -0.0004 vs O (flat); AUPRC +0.0015 (below floor); auxiliary TTT signal didn't transfer to better generation; gen_median_steps stuck at 5

architectural 24h cap on Δt magnitude head (sigmoid-scaled instead of softplus); gen_median_steps 5→83 (matches F4!) BUT mean AUROC collapsed 0.506→0.259; rare outcomes unlock positive windows but Phase3 head anti-discriminative (0.08-0.13); 3 outcomes improved (RELEASE +0.12 DEATH +0.05 HYPERGLY +0.05) 3 regressed (CARDIO -0.36 KIDNEY -0.13 HYPOGLY -0.06); 24h too aggressive — try 72h

combine R (24h mag cap) + Q (TTT regression head) on O; AUROC essentially identical to R (0.260 vs 0.259); TTT auxiliary signal didn't compensate for backbone hidden-state disruption from bounded magnitude; same per-outcome split as R — fundamental architectural trade-off (short-term vs long-term capacity)

replace R's hard 24h cap with soft penalty λ*ReLU(Δt-24h)² on top of O; AUROC essentially flat vs O (+0.0002); gen_median_steps actually went DOWN (5→4); penalty too weak to overcome MSE pull at seed-end position

INFRASTRUCTURE FIX: original O ran with raw λ=1.0 traj-loss that dominated gradients (29555 vs BCE 0.42), BCE/CE/Δt frozen for 27 epochs — all O-stacked experiments (P-T) built on untrained backbone! Fix: add 'traj' to phase2_scheduler aux_fraction_caps=0.30 so λ_traj calibrated as fraction*BCE/traj_raw. Now BCE 0.40→0.32 descending, val_loss 0.38 (vs broken O 5196). Raw baseline AUROC 0.499→0.503 marginal; gen_median_hours 1.08→211h (eliminated immediate-termination); MAE regressed (longer trajectories → later onset predictions, expected). This is the new training baseline — failed experiments P/Q/R/S/T must be redone.

redo R on top of fixed O2 backbone: 24h hard cap on Δt magnitude head; gen_median_steps 4→59 ✓ gen_median_hours 211→284h ✓ — but mean AUROC still collapses to 0.271 (same pattern as broken-backbone R 0.259); confirms the per-outcome trade-off is REAL not a training artefact; bounded mag head shifts hidden states such that DEATH/RELEASE/HYPERGLY improve (0.54-0.60) but CARDIO/KIDNEY/HYPOGLY regress (0.15-0.46) and rare outcomes anti-discriminative (0.11)
